jobline.lineDescription: Size: 150mm x 103mm||Material: Semi Gloss Paper Permanent||Print Colour: CMYK||Tool: D0431(4,2)(0,1)1.5mm Rectangle||Provided on 40mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE VARNISH||HAND APPLIED||Supply: Rolls of 500||2,000 x LES0301016 Bunzl Crumb Fine White 10kg||500 x LES0301018 - Bunzl Crumb Fine Golden 10kg||1,000 x LES0301022 - Bunzl Crumb Medium White 10kg Red||1,000 x NC1001 - Neild Co Sliced White Bread Crumbs Fine Lisarow Address||2,000 x IK1001 - Ikon Sliced White Bread Crumbs Fine||*ALL NEW ARTWORK*||Roll Direction 2 or 3||||***Current set pricing until 5000 Set pricing agreed upon***||
jobline.deliveryToAddress: SEDA PTY LTD, 4-6 BOOLA AVENUE, YENNORA, New South Wales, 2161, Australia
